item_specifications.special_feature: Durable, Easy to Clean, Easy to Use

about_item: Waterproof & UV-Resistant: ‌Constructed from premium, heavy-duty 600D polyester treated for water resistance and UV protection, this kennel cover shields your pet from sun, rain, and daily use.

Ventilation & Breathable Mesh：Breathable mesh ensures airflow to prevent overheating while keeping a cozy den-like space. Mesh windows let your dog see out, reducing anxiety, while the cover blocks excess light and noise for better naps. Ventilation minimizes humidity, keeping the crate fresh.

Great Fit for Your Crate: The crate cover dimensions are 42"L x 28"W x 30"H. Universally fits most brands’ standard 42-inch wire crates well. The package includes 1 x crate cover (only the cover, not including the wire crate)

Easy Setup: Simply position the cover on the crate, then fasten the elastic toggles at the bottom corners to secure it in place. Top zippered openings can pull out the handle for moving crate anywhere

Dual Zippered Panels: This dog crate cover features dual zippered panels on both the front and side, providing flexible access options to accommodate different door positions of the crate. The versatile design allows for easy opening from multiple angles while maintaining full coverage and security

summary.text: Customers find the crate cover fits well and is made of sturdy material, with smooth, secure zippers that allow for ventilation. They appreciate its appearance, with one customer noting it gives their apartment a cohesive look, and find it easy to put on and take off. The durability receives mixed feedback - while some say it lasts longer than previous covers, others report it ripping on day 2 at the bottom.

authors_reviews.title: Finally—A Cover That Actually Fits!
authors_reviews.text: After a frustrating experience with a different brand that was way too small, I am so relieved I found this one. It worked perfectly on the first try!What stands out:Sizing Accuracy: Unlike the first cover I tried, this one is true to its measurements. It fits my crate perfectly without me having to pull or stretch the fabric to make it work.Easy Setup: It was incredibly easy to put on. Because the sizing is so precise, it just drops right into place.Smooth Zippers: The zippers are high-quality and work smoothly every time. No sticking or snagging, which is a huge plus for daily use.Simple to Clean: I really appreciate the interior material. It’s very easy to wipe down and keep fresh, which is essential for any pet product.If you’ve struggled with covers that are too tight or poorly made, save yourself the headache and go with this one. It’s well-constructed and fits exactly like it should.
authors_reviews.author: Allyssa

authors_reviews.title: Surprisingly Nice!
authors_reviews.text: Love this! The last time we bought a crate cover was about 17 years ago. It was tan and basic. Well we just got 2 puppies and needed crate covers for all 3. After reviewing everyone that had a 4.0 rating or higher, I was seriously confused. Days went by as I reread every review again. Finally my husband told me on Thursday to just buy one. I got 2 of these for a 30” crate. I picked the “Minimalist” gray one. They arrived today and we put it on one of them. Our girl puppies are complete opposites. One is fearless and the other was abused before and afraid of EVERYTHING. After we put it on, we waited to see if either pup would go in. The scared one sniffed it and went in immediately. She’s been in there for about an hour and seems to love it. She is a phantom black mini Bernedoodle and you can barely see her. I called her to come out and she wouldn’t budge. We look the gray look too, very nice looking as opposed to some of those cheap ones.If you are on the fence…buy it. We love it so far. And it does have toggles at the bottom for a better fit and zippers for the handle on top as well as the 2 pieces that you can roll up. And toggles hold that too.It looks a little loose on one size because we did not pull it down yet on that side, but it does fit well!
authors_reviews.author: Lesley

authors_reviews.title: Kennel cover
authors_reviews.text: I don’t usually leave reviews or spend the money on this but I am very happy with this kennel cover. It was easy to put on and my dogs absolutely love it. Most times they would be non stop barking but now they feel nice, cozy, and warm since it’s very cold currently. The fabric is sturdy and I like the fact it has zippers so if my dog is particularly anxious I can completely enclose him for a few minutes to I calm down. If your dog is a chewer I can’t say how well it will hold up tho if you put it in right I think it would be pretty hard to chew. Overall I recommend this product.
authors_reviews.author: Sarah

authors_reviews.title: Definitely worth it
authors_reviews.text: Fits the kennel perfectly! Nice thick canvas like material and quality zippers. Makes the kennel look nicer since it was previously covered with a blanket. There is a vent/netting space that my dog can see through. I wish it had a cover because he tends to bark if he can see us. There is only one opening/door on the side so if that’s what you need to use it will determine the side that the vent space is on. Something to consider if your dog is like mine. Overall it’s a good quality design that looks like it’ll last years!
authors_reviews.author: Margaret M

authors_reviews.title: I'd do it again
authors_reviews.text: I'd get one again, even though it doesn't solve my long list of wants and it fits my wire crate pretty well. When it had a chance to loosen up in the sun for a couple of minutes, it went on with no problems. Dog show people usually refer to the 36 L x 23 W x 25 H as a size "400" crate. (At least the old ones do!) Why they put a handle on top of a crate this size is beyond me because their weight doesn't lend itself be picked it up that way, so there's no need for a handle opening on the top of the cover. I wasn't too crazy about the strap-type piece that goes across the nottom of the sides where the doors are located. I would have preferred no strap and a better solution taking place at the corners and bottom edges for the doors. The straps do keep the cover in place There's no question the material will keep the interior dry with the doors closed. Initially, it has an almost rubbery feel, but is quire flexible. I chose the light tan color and it will be easy to clean. It may not be the cover for all of my needs, because I'm a fanatic about proper air circulation for a crated dog and the treated material may not allow much airflow when the doors are closed. I store my equipment inside the locked crate over night at a dog show site, and this would be a handy cover - it folds up fairly small for transport. Of concern? I think the toggle/loop closure to retain the rolled up the door flaps will fail in the long run, but that is presently how most of these crate covers are being made. Maybe 2 or 3 sewn in little velcro tabs per door would be a better option. The workmanship is very good and for this size crate the price under $25 was exceptional. I would certainly put this cover to use, just not with a crated dog inside. Solid darkness inside isn't something I'd want for a dog, but a darker cover color would accomplish that. I will also consider buying another crate cover from this mfr. in the future.
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

authors_reviews.title: Great quality and color
authors_reviews.text: The beige color looks so natural. It makes a large crate blend into a room. Great quality and very easy to steam clean the wrinkles out.
authors_reviews.author: Cyndi

authors_reviews.title: Thick, high quality cover that fits exactly
authors_reviews.text: Needed an exact size/fit cover for a dog crate that I’m using as a temporary rabbit hutch until the custom built one is finished. This fits like glove, is very thick, and has zippered flaps in the correct locations. I can’t testify whether or not it’s waterproof, but the product description indicated it is.
authors_reviews.author: WZ

authors_reviews.title: Definitely recommend. Exceeds expectations
authors_reviews.text: Fits perfectly! Thick material. This is for the biggest dog crate I’ve ever seen. It’s for a Great Dane and it fits great. I’m going to sit it out a few days first bc it has a strong chemical smell.
authors_reviews.author: Up And Down Aviation, LLC

other_countries_reviews.title: Great crate cover
other_countries_reviews.text: Really lovely crate cover, looks nice, fits well and good quality.
other_countries_reviews.author: Charlie

other_countries_reviews.title: Perfect for us
other_countries_reviews.text: Really good value and good quality crate cover. Was cheaper than others I’d seen so wasn’t sure but took a gamble and it was totally worth it. It hooks on well and the zips work smoothly. The front cover does only have one fastening in the middle which would be annoying to shut the crate door as the material falls down a little either side of it but we don’t bother with the hassle of clipping up and just fold it on top so is no issue for us. Would recommend
other_countries_reviews.author: Lady Lauren Harding

other_countries_reviews.title: Great product
other_countries_reviews.text: Fits like a glove. I have the 36” cage and it’s true to size. Very happy
other_countries_reviews.author: CJS

other_countries_reviews.title: Fits like a glove, creates a nice den space for your dog
other_countries_reviews.text: I've had this for nearly 2 years now, and it's in excellent shape. I only put in on in the cooler months as I think it's a bit too heavy and would get too warm for summertime. It's pretty thick and fits my crate like a glove, and I secure the bottom to the rails with the clasps provided for a good fit. I keep 1 side rolled up all the time for access on the main crate door, and on some cold nights or when I think she could use something more cave like, I roll the other side down where she has the double door access. Neither have any wear by staying in that position long term. It is really dark inside, I can see how this could settle an anxious dog and help if there is alot of movement that might be around the crate that you want to prevent your dog from seeing. Has a zipper on top if you want to poke the handle of the crate through. It's never gotten dirty, but could easily be wiped up with a damp cloth. Over all super happy.
other_countries_reviews.author: J. P

other_countries_reviews.title: Dog bed cover
other_countries_reviews.text: This crate is an odd measurement, but this cover fits excellently and is the only one I have found to be the correct size. Second one I have brought
other_countries_reviews.author: A Thompson
